landing.heroSubtitle: Gather all your important life information in one secure place — bank accounts, insurance, contracts, wishes — and ensure your loved ones can access it when needed.
landing.heroHeading:
Your life is 0% organized.
Shall we start?
landing.trialNote: 14-day trial period. No credit card required.
landing.feature1Desc: Add your bank accounts, insurance, contracts, passwords and other important data to a secure vault. Everything is encrypted.
landing.feature2Desc: Choose people who get access to your information when you can no longer manage it yourself. You decide who sees what.
landing.feature3Desc: Pärandiplaan keeps your information secure and reminds you regularly that everything is up to date. Peace of mind guaranteed.
landing.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to organize your life
landing.categoriesTitle: Your whole life in one place
landing.categoriesSubtitle: 10 categories for organizing what matters most
landing.handoverSubtitle: Your safety net that works automatically
landing.pricingSubtitle: Try 14 days free, then choose a plan
landing.ctaTitle: Don't wait until it's too late
landing.ctaDesc: Every minute your life info is unorganized is a risk for your loved ones. Start today — it takes only 10 minutes.
landing.step2: Add important life info by category

auth.registerNote: 14 days free. No credit card required.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.termsAgree: By creating an account you agree to our

vault.title: Vault
vault.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry? This action cannot be undone.
vault.reminderHint: We'll send reminders 30, 14 and 7 days before
vault.noEntries: No entries in this category yet.

contacts.title: Trusted Contacts
contacts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this trusted contact? This action cannot be undone.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.noContacts: You haven't added any trusted contacts yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.passwordWarning: Changing your password will re-encrypt all vault data with the new password. This may take a moment.
settings.backupCodesDesc: Backup codes allow you to log in if you don't have access to your authenticator app.
settings.deleteWarning: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data, including vault entries, files and trusted contacts.
settings.deleteConfirmText: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.

404.title: Page not found
404.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

403.title: Access denied
403.desc: You don't have permission to view this page.

500.title: Server error
500.desc: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Pärandiplaan helps you organize all important info — bank accounts, insurance, digital accounts and much more — so your loved ones are protected when you're gone.
onboarding.welcomeDesc2: We'll set up your plan in a few minutes. You can skip any step.
onboarding.addBankDesc: Let's start with the most common — your bank account.
onboarding.addDigitalIdDesc: Smart-ID and Mobile-ID PINs are important info that should be securely stored.
onboarding.addContactDesc: A trusted contact is a person who will be given access to your data when needed. This is one of the most important parts of your plan.
onboarding.doneHint: You can always add new entries, fill categories and change settings from your dashboard.

shared.title: Shared Vault
shared.accessGranted: You have been granted access to vault data.
shared.warning: This link contains sensitive information. Do not share it with others.

invite.title: Trusted contact invitation
invite.acceptedDesc: You are now registered as a trusted contact. When the owner grants you access to their vault data, you will receive a notification by email.
invite.acceptedHint: If you already have a Pärandiplaan account, you'll see shared data on your dashboard. Otherwise, you'll receive a link directly by email.
invite.invalidDesc: This invitation link is invalid or incomplete. Please check that you copied the entire link.

offline.title: No connection
offline.desc: You are currently offline. Please try again later.
